series_metadata.series_description: This is information filed by site name for all the Network's construction projects, (stations, transmitters, translators, STL) and contains such technical data as listed: FCC Applications and Licenses*; FCC Construction Permits; FCC Maintenance Logs**; FAA Tower Authorizations; FAA Tower Lighting; Proof of Performance Tests; Tower Analysis; Information & Drawings; Path Surveys, Profiles and Expansions; Grade B Contours and Supplemental Coverages.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: as long as project, as constructed is in existence
